description:
CLI tool to analyze GPX activity files

Analyzes GPX tracks with distance, elevation gain/loss, speed, stop detection,
and biometrics (heart rate, power, cadence, temperature). Includes altitude
correction via SRTM digital elevation model. Self-contained Native AOT binary
with no runtime dependency.
What's Changed
- chore(oss): open-source project health, CI and repo automation by @jchable in #6
Full Changelog: v0.1.0-alpha...v0.1.1
